summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Dashboard feature completed. All backend APIs working (100% - 26/26 tests). Admin dashboard fully functional: stats cards, pending submissions list, review modal, approve/reject flows all working correctly.
passed_tests: Admin dashboard shows stats cards (Pending Reviews, Total Ranges, Virginia, Maryland)
Admin submissions list displays pending ranges with Review buttons
Click 'Review' opens modal with full submission details (Location, Contact, Hours, Amenities, Description)
Approve button adds range to directory and removes from pending - stats update correctly
Reject button removes submission from pending - toast confirmation shown
Back to Directory navigation works - navigates to homepage
POST /api/admin/submissions/{id}/approve endpoint works - moves to ranges collection
Homepage still works with map/list toggle
Submit Range form still works - shows success page after submission
Approved ranges appear in main directory with verified=true
All 26 backend API tests pass including 6 new admin dashboard tests
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: RangeDetailPage.js has ESLint warning about missing useEffect dependency - not blocking functionality
seed_data_creation: Test submissions created and cleaned up during testing. Final state: 80 total ranges (78 original + 2 approved during testing), 0 pending submissions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard feature fully tested and working. Endpoints: GET /api/admin/submissions (list pending), POST /api/admin/submissions/{id}/approve (approve and add to directory), POST /api/admin/submissions/{id}/reject (delete submission). Submissions stored in 'range_submissions' collection until approved, then moved to 'ranges' collection with verified=true. Stats: 80 total ranges (44 VA, 33 MD, 3 DC), 61 indoor, 18 outdoor.
